artifacts.title: Catania University DMI AI Teaching Guidance Staging Notes
artifacts.summary: This staged bundle adds official-source candidates for Catania University's DMI AI and teaching section, the linked Studiare con l'IA page, and the linked PDF guide. Claims are scoped to DMI departmental guidance: AI as study support rather than a substitute, source verification, limits around assessed work, and avoiding personal or sensitive data sharing.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
No central university-wide AI policy was found in this pass; staged claims are scoped to official DMI departmental guidance.
Rejected search results included a low-specificity central program PDF, an event/news page, and a course syllabus result.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
